parameters.subject: How was your experience with Dr. Sayuj?
parameters.text:
Dear {{$node["Split Patients"].json["firstName"]}},

We hope you are recovering well following your recent visit with Dr. Sayuj.

Your health and comfort are our top priorities. We would be incredibly grateful if you could take a brief moment to share your experience with us. Your feedback directly helps us improve the quality of care for all our neurosurgery patients.

Please click here to share your thoughts: https://www.drsayuj.info/feedback?id={{$node["Split Patients"].json["id"]}}

Wishing you continued health and a smooth recovery,

The Team at Dr. Sayuj's Clinic
